description: Step out in style with this Jiff puma sandals to make an impressionable style statement. This pair of sandals comes with superior performance. It features a synthetic and suede upper with an attractive brand logo and textured footbed that ensures maximum comfort for the feet. Team it with shorts or jeans and t-shirts to look and feel cool.UpperSynthetic and suede upper with puma logo and a seamless fabric and elasticated back-strap for added comfort and durability EVA footbed for enhanced gripToe separator to keep foot in place and added styleOutsoleMulti-directional wave-like textured grooves and puma logo embossed above the heel for maximum grip and tractionsandal careWipe surface with a soft, damp cloth and use a suede brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
